Trepidation  

Description

1: Fear up to level 52

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 200 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 2.5 Recast Time: 7
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Resist Adjust: -25 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your mind fills with trepidation.
Cast on other: Soandso is filled with trepidation.
Effect Fades: The trepidation fades.

Game Description

A booming voice fills your target's ears, causing them to flee in terror.

Items with this effect

  • Medallion of Dread
  • Spell: Trepidation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Trepidation
ClassLevel
CLR57
NEC56
ENC56
Expansion:

Duration:
6 ticks
  • Comments (16)
  • Sold By (13)
  • Dropped By (13)
  • NPCs with Ability (1)

Post Comment
new spell location
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2016 at 12:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1706487388669
Scholar
26 posts
This spell dropped off a bottomless devourer. PLZ UPDATE ZAM. Thanks.
▲ Page top
new spell location
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2016 at 2:41 AM Rating: Good
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
Pukespot wrote:
This spell dropped off a bottomless devourer. PLZ UPDATE ZAM. Thanks.

Which zone, Skyfire Mountains or Howling Stones ? Both have a bottomless devourer. Also it's better to post this kind of information on the NPC page or the Item page rather than the spell page.
▲ Page top
usage
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2008 at 3:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863387220
83 posts
Very dissapointed that we necro's, apparently one of the most feared and loathed classes in the game, have been reduced to the level of a schoolyard bully. i detest that we can only fear mobs that are smaller than ourselves and it seriously cramps our style of combat.

However, the being said this spell is better than invoke fear. Not only is it of a much higher level, ergo harder to resist- it also has a better negative resist built in.
my favorite improvement on this spell is the drop from 7 ticks to 6. that makes it perfect for ping pong when our root is inefective. and that extra six seconds as any fear kiter will tell you can mean the difference between not being hit and the mob going too far away and bringing back friends.
In short, the reduced effect time actually increases the amount of places a low level AA hunter can farm xp.
▲ Page top
Wrong Vendor
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2005 at 4:46 PM Rating: Default
Otternaut
292 posts
The vendor that sells these in Abysmal Sea is named Phoenth Ingven. Never found the other one.
▲ Page top
Vendor location
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2004 at 11:23 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593374729465
Scholar
167 posts
Nertith Gracon is located at neg3979 by pos2621 in a two hut setup directly behind the large two hut hall used by Captain Nealith. Was kind of hard to find until I used my ranger to find her. I hope this helps a little bit in your adventures.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendor location
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2006 at 2:02 AM Rating: Decent
Silvercheif
Scholar
64 posts
Her new Location is POS 428 neg 3362 POS 159
▲ Page top
Monster level
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2004 at 10:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802937666
30 posts
This spell works on monsters less than level 53. Ie. you can fear level 52s but not level 53 and above.

Disclaimer: I only tested this in the Plane of Nighmare. It might work differently on other "continents".
▲ Page top
forget it
QuoteReply
# May 01 2004 at 4:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786302754
83 posts
forget this spell as a cleric, it has no value to you at this level!! Sincerly a lvl 65 cleric!!

Trepidation
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2003 at 4:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780877105
12 posts
I don't know for sure if the level 55 border can be crossed with this spell, but I'll test it soon.

Love,

Wandriana

Edited, Fri Oct 31 12:36:51 2003
▲ Page top
OVERTHERE
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2003 at 10:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251709006
145 posts
You can buy this spell off the OT vendors. Unless it is some goodie goodie class like them treehuggers. All spells sold at Firiona Vie are sold Overthere.

OH one last thing. PC spell Vendors in the BAZAAR are totally ruthless. I have seen people selling the above spell for 500pp ! I wont even go into the mark up these greedy hosers put on the 'hard to find' spells sold on NPC merchants all over the game. As much as I hate stupid people, for some reason I loathe the ones exploiting the lazy idiots more. Go figure.

Edited, Sat Apr 5 22:07:57 2003
▲ Page top
invoke fear better !!
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2002 at 4:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759827537
2 posts
the time it last on this spell is 6 ticks m invoke fear last 7 , why would anyone want this spell?
▲ Page top
RE: invoke fear better !!
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2003 at 9:48 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591775340442
72 posts
This one has -25 magic for its check. Invoke only has -20 so this will have a better chance to hit, if only a small one.
▲ Page top
RE: invoke fear better !!
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2003 at 10:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362004533
32 posts
Becuse some fears only work on higher lvl mobs, i'ts like charm line
▲ Page top
RE: invoke fear better !!
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2003 at 2:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781140857
View User Forum
68 posts
No, that is unfortunately not true. I have yet to see trepidation land on anything that invoke fear would not land on. The irony is that invoke fear is the upgrade to trepidation for chanters I believe it was. Same basic deal with one of the root spells, but I can't remember which. Some things just never do make sense . . . .
